title: New CI VMs, to give us pasta 2024-04-05
body:
Source: https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/345

@mheon yesterday in standup you mentioned that you needed new aardvark-dns packages for (something). Are those packages available anywhere? If so, this VM build didn't get them.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@edsantiago Nope. Bit of a chicken and the egg problem. Aardvark needs changes in Netavark, Netavark needs changes in Aardvark, neither can pass CI without the other being fixed. Trying to figure out how to fix this without a complete redesign of my patches.
